title: SDK monday.listen for beforeunload
excerpt: For app development, it would be helpful to have an SDK monday.listen option for “beforeunload” (when switching to another view or the associated board within monday.com), to be able to prompt the user to save changes. C…

posts.author: ASalchert (Andrew Salchert)
posts.cookedHtml: For app development, it would be helpful to have an SDK monday.listen option for “beforeunload” (when switching to another view or the associated board within monday.com), to be able to prompt the user to save changes. Currently, when returning to a view after leaving it, the view is reloaded and all changes are lost.
